inputs.label: True Value
inputs.businessContext: Reference or standard value for comparison.

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference or standard value for comparison.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşılaştırma için referans veya standart değer.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de référence ou standard pour comparaison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de referencia o estándar para comparación.

inputs.label: Full Scale
inputs.businessContext: Full scale range of the instrument.

businessContext_i18n.en: Full scale range of the instrument.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Plage de pleine échelle de l'instrument.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rango de escala completa del instrumento.

inputs.label: Tolerance Limit
inputs.businessContext: Maximum permissible absolute error for pass/fail.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum permissible absolute error for pass/fail.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçer/kalır için izin verilen maksimum mutlak hata.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässiger absoluter Fehler für Bestehen/Nichtbestehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Erreur absolue maximale admissible pour succès/échec.
businessContext_i18n.es: Error absoluto máximo permitido para aprobado/rechazado.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Known systematic error to correct the measured value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Known systematic error to correct the measured value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçülen değeri düzeltmek için bilinen sistematik hata.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bekannter systematischer Fehler zur Korrektur des Messwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Erreur systématique connue pour corriger la valeur mesurée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Error sistemático conocido para corregir el valor medido.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
